acceptance.label: A dedicated authoritative mutation path exists and is used for hot-path coordination updates
The old generic persistence wrapper no longer forces tracked snapshot publication, startup checkpoint writes, read-model saves, and compaction on every authoritative mutation
Trace output distinguishes the minimal authoritative commit phase from any deferred follow-on work

payload.summary: Split the current generic coordination mutation persistence path so a request-path mutation can commit the authoritative delta and shared coordination CAS update without synchronously paying for tracked snapshot publication, startup checkpoint writes, read-model saves, or compaction.
payload.title: Extract a minimal authoritative mutation commit path from the generic persistence pipeline
